Container.Name: milvus
Container.Overview: Open-source vector database for similarity search over embeddings. Runs in Standalone mode — needs an S3-compatible object store (Garage or MinIO) and an etcd instance for metadata; both default-configured to the paired templates in this repo. [br]Paste your S3 Access Key ID and Secret below. See the repo README for the four-command Garage bucket setup if you don't already have credentials.
Container.Description: Milvus Standalone (single-node) pointed at Garage for object storage and etcd for metadata. All configuration is via env vars — no milvus.yaml mount required.

Config.Name: gRPC API
Config.Description: Milvus gRPC API — pymilvus clients and memsearch connect here.

Config.Name: Health / Metrics
Config.Description: HTTP health endpoint (/healthz) and Prometheus metrics (/metrics).

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Milvus local data (rocksmq WAL, staging). For best performance configure the appdata share to prefer a cache pool / SSD.

Config.Name: MINIO_ACCESS_KEY_ID
Config.Description: Garage access key ID from 'garage key info --show-secret milvus-key'.

Config.Name: MINIO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Garage secret key from 'garage key info --show-secret milvus-key'.

Config.Name: ETCD_ENDPOINTS
Config.Description: Container name:port of etcd on the shared Docker network. Default works with the paired etcd template.

Config.Name: MINIO_ADDRESS
Config.Description: Hostname of the S3-compatible store (container name on milvus-net).

Config.Name: MINIO_PORT
Config.Description: S3 API port on the Garage container.

Config.Name: MINIO_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Bucket name created in Garage (matches the 'garage bucket create' command).

Config.Name: MINIO_ROOT_PATH
Config.Description: Prefix inside the bucket for all Milvus objects.

Config.Name: MINIO_REGION
Config.Description: Must match Garage's GARAGE_S3_REGION. SigV4 rejects mismatches with 'AuthorizationHeaderMalformed'.

Config.Name: MINIO_USE_VIRTUAL_HOST
Config.Description: Path-style S3 addressing. Must be false for Garage (no wildcard DNS in our setup).

Config.Name: MINIO_USE_SSL
Config.Description: Plain HTTP within milvus-net. Set true only if Garage is behind HTTPS.

Config.Name: COMMON_STORAGE_TYPE
Config.Description: Use remote object storage (Garage) vs local filesystem.

Config.Name: MQ_TYPE
Config.Description: Message queue backend. MUST be rocksmq for standalone — default is kafka which fails to connect.

Config.Name: LOCAL_STORAGE_PATH
Config.Description: Inside-container path for segment cache. Must be explicit — empty default causes QueryNode FATAL.

Config.Name: ROCKSMQ_PATH
Config.Description: Inside-container path for rocksmq WAL.

Config.Name: DATA_COORD_SEGMENT_MIN_SIZE_FROM_IDLE_TO_SEALED
Config.Description: Pinned to avoid 2.6.x stats-config validator panic on large-memory hosts.

Config.Name: PROXY_PORT
Config.Description: External gRPC port. Pinned to avoid 2.6 MixCoord port-collision startup bug.

Config.Name: ROOT_COORD_PORT
Config.Description: On 2.6 MixCoord binds this port. MUST be distinct from PROXY_PORT.
